body.title: PE chain HYPOTHESIZE injects coding standards before edit
body.result: _get_coding_standards() injects CODING_STANDARDS_ROOT rule narratives into HYPOTHESIZE prompt; gated on write ops; capped at 6 rules
body.description: Before generating a file edit, walk CODING_STANDARDS_ROOT children and prepend rule narratives to the HYPOTHESIZE prompt. Only when task involves a file write. Prereq: coding standards nodes seeded (done 2026-04-06), T-facia-template-provenance.
